title: Slovakian Delicate Perilla Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish made with delicate dumplings and perilla, perfect for a light meal.
instructions: 1. Clean and chop the perilla leaves.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, eggs, Slovakian cheese, salt, and black pepper.
3. Mix the dough until smooth and elastic.
5. Divide the dough into small balls.
6. Flatten each ball of dough into a disk.
7. Place a tablespoon of chopped perilla leaves in the center of each disk.
8. Fold the dough over the perilla leaves and press the edges together to seal.
9. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
10. Carefully add the dumplings to the pot and cook for 5-7 minutes.
11. Remove the dumplings from the pot with a slotted spoon.
12. Serve the dumplings hot with the chopped perilla leaves on top.
